title: Cirrus: Initial implementation
body:
Based on containers/storage

Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>

comments.body: okay, this is minimally functional now.  Though I haven't tested `hack/get_ci_vm.sh` yet.
Nice start overall @cevich Just a few nits and a question.
okay, tested `hack/get_ci_vm.sh` seems to work for me, though would be good to confirm it works for @nalind
@TomSweeneyRedHat thanks a bunch for your review, going through it now.

@TomSweeneyRedHat @rhatdan @nalind PTAL I think this is good'nuff for now.  Though I would like someone to confirm `hack/get_ci_vm.sh` is working in this repo., I only gave it a quick poke and I've got so many tools and configs installed locally, it may have worked by accident.

:pushpin: Commit c0e354b has been approved by `rhatdan`
